subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Ḥasan! The Lord of the seen and unseen hath turned toward thee from this Prison-land and maketh mention of thee. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالحسن مالک سر و علن از شطر سجن بتو توجه نموده و ترا ذکر مینماید طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
